

## Directory structure per 2026-06

*Generated by Claude, 2026-06-09. Reviewed for accuracy, based on refactoring session that day.*

### Input data directory (`inputdirectory`)

The raw source images live outside the pipeline-managed folders. Phase 1 and
Phase 3 both read from this location via `Phase1Config.inputdirectory` /
`Phase3Config.inputdirectory`. The pipeline never writes here.

```
<inputdirectory>/
├── <subdir_A>/
│   ├── image_001.tif
│   ├── image_002.tif
│   └── ...
├── <subdir_B>/
│   └── ...
└── image_at_root.tif        # subdir column = '' or '.' in metadata
```

`subdir` entries in the metadata xlsx are paths relative to `inputdirectory`.

---

### Training directory (`training_dir`) — shared by phase 1 & 2

Single folder that holds everything produced during annotation (phase 1) and
training (phase 2). Configured via `Phase1Config.training_dir` and
`Phase2Config.training_dir` — both must point to the same path for a given
project.

```
<training_dir>/
├── metadata_imagefiles_autogen.xlsx     # auto-generated by gen_metadatafile
├── metadata_imagefiles.xlsx             # user-curated copy (train/test column filled in)
├── training_images_filelist.txt         # provenance snapshot: header + <subdir>/<filename> per line
├── phase1_log_<timestamp>.yaml          # config dump from phase 1 run
├── phase2_log_<model_timestamp>.yaml    # config dump from phase 2 run
├── humanseg/                            # human-corrected segmentation masks (_seg.npy / .tif)
│   └── <subdir>/...
├── models/                              # trained U-Net checkpoints
│   └── unet_<timestamp>.pt
├── plots/                               # phase 1 annotation plots
│   └── <subdir>/...
├── plots_training/                      # phase 2 training-curve plots
│   └── ...
└── originals/                           # ONLY if Phase1Config.copy_originals=True
    └── <subdir>/...                     # mirror of inputdirectory layout
```

Phase 1 additionally writes a working segfolder, by convention
`<training_dir>/segfiles_humancorr/` (set on `config1.segfolder` in the
example scripts).

---

### Segmentation directory (`segmentation_dir`) — phase 3

Per-run output folder for inference. Conventionally named
`<data_root>/SEGMENTATIONS_<id>/` (e.g. `SEGMENTATIONS_20260609/`). Configured
via `Phase3Config.segmentation_dir`.

```
<segmentation_dir>/
├── log_segmentation.yaml        # config dump from the phase 3 run
├── segfiles/
│   └── <subdir>/
│       ├── image_001_seg.npy
│       └── ...
└── plots/
    └── <subdir>/
        ├── image_001_overlay.png
        └── ...
```

The `<subdir>` layout under `segfiles/` and `plots/` mirrors the `subdir`
column of the metadata table, which in turn mirrors `inputdirectory`.
